checkDescription: If you select check as the payment method, you'll need to write a physical check to this employee each payday.
checkDescriptionSelf: If you select check as the payment method, you'll receive a physical check.

deleteBankAccountDialog.title: Delete bank account
deleteBankAccountDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the bank account {{account}}?

directDepositDescription: We recommend direct deposit — we can deposit paychecks directly into your employees' bank accounts.
directDepositDescriptionSelf: We recommend direct deposit — we can deposit paychecks directly into your account.
title: Payment method
splitDescription:
You can split your paycheck into different accounts by percentage or flat dollar amounts.

When splitting by amount, you can reorder the priority of the bank accounts by clicking and dragging the list icon to the left of the bank account field. We’ll pay the amounts in the order specified until your salary has been fully distributed to the last “remainder” account.

validations.percentageError: If payment method amount is split by Percentage, all split amounts must add up to exactly 100.
validations.percentageAmountError: Percentage should be a whole number between 0 and 100
validations.routingNumber: Routing number should be a number (9 digits)
validations.accountNumber: Account number is a required field
validations.accountNumberFormat: Account number should contain only digits (up to 17)
